notes: I just did about 4 HackerRank questions on Java. I actually realized I might learn better with videos because I remembered something relating to the Scanner Object and how there's like this weird issue when you your'e dealing with back to back scanner objects/ data types and how you have to clear it before going to a nextLine() string call because the previous nextInt(),nextDouble() affects the strings final output because of the left over '\n' character. I'm learning about the java printf method, which works similar to print/println. An example, System.out.printf("I was born in %d,2001);. Very cool thing, its basically to help with formatting.
